ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the account */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner of the account (customer username) */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number assigned to the account */,
  "withdrawal_limit" REAL /* Maximum amount that can be withdrawn */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., withdrawal, deposit) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "transaction_category" TEXT /* Category of the transaction (e.g., food, transportation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "withdrawal_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each withdrawal request */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date of the withdrawal request */,
  "amount_requested" REAL /* Amount requested for withdrawal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the request (e.g., online, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_withdrawal_requests_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_security" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the security settings */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the security settings */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the account */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login attempt */,
  "login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_security_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account for which the alert is set */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., low_balance, large_withdrawal) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, dismissed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the access record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee accessing the system */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., teller, manager) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_access_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employee_information ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_information" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the employee (e.g., customer service, IT) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change was made */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" TEXT /* Employee who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "monthly_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date of the statement */,
  "statement_balance" REAL /* Balance of the account at the time of the statement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_monthly_statements_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., account creation, password reset) */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_history_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)
